summary: Iteration 33 - Tested push notification preferences feature. Found and FIXED critical bug: preferences were being saved to wrong MongoDB collection (db.users instead of db.advocates). All 21 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI working correctly with all interactions: toggle individual preferences, disable/enable all, reset to defaults.

backend_api: GET returns all 19 notification types - PASS
All preferences default to ON (True) - PASS
Category structure tests (7 categories, correct counts) - PASS
frontend_ui: Notifications tab appears in Profile page - PASS
All 7 categories displayed with correct icons - PASS
Disable All button disables all preferences - PASS
Enable All button enables all preferences - PASS
Reset button resets to defaults - PASS
Toast notifications show for actions - PASS
data_persistence: Preferences persist after page reload - PASS (after fix)
Toggle all persists correctly - PASS (after fix)

bug_fixed.description: Notification preferences were being saved to db.users collection but advocates are stored in db.advocates collection. This caused preferences to not persist - updates would return success but GET would return defaults.
bug_fixed.root_cause: Notification preference endpoints (GET, PUT, POST reset, POST toggle-all) and helper functions (notify_stamp_event, get_user_notification_preferences) all used db.users.find_one() and db.users.update_one() instead of db.advocates
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Modified all notification preference functions to check db.advocates first, then fall back to db.users (for admin/super_admin accounts). Updated 6 functions in server.py: get_notification_preferences, update_notification_preferences, reset_notification_preferences, toggle_all_notifications, notify_stamp_event, get_user_notification_preferences

ui_components.NotificationSettings.jsx: Full component with category accordions, switches, master toggle, reset button

critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix was critical - preferences were not persisting before fix
Good implementation of DEFAULT_NOTIFICATION_PREFERENCES constant with all 19 types
notify_stamp_event correctly checks preferences before sending notifications
Frontend NotificationSettings component well-structured with proper data-testid attributes
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed notification preference endpoints to use db.advocates
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification preferences feature fully working. 19 notification types across 7 categories. All endpoints: GET /api/notifications/preferences, PUT /api/notifications/preferences, POST /api/notifications/preferences/reset, POST /api/notifications/preferences/toggle-all. ProfilePage has Notifications tab at /profile?tab=notifications. NotificationSettings component in /app/frontend/src/components/NotificationSettings.jsx. Critical bug fixed: preferences now correctly saved to db.advocates collection.
